zh.Barnard Castle, Durham, England: 英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Balliol於1260年出生在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素時，她的父親John de Balliol11257歲，母親Devorguilla of Galloway50歲。她和Brian FitzAlan至少有2個女兒。她去世於1340年4月10日在英國越可爾哈布萊頓享年80歲。

zh-hans.Barnard Castle, Durham, England: 英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Balliol于1260年出生在英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素时，她的父亲John de Balliol11257岁，母亲Devorguilla of Galloway50岁。她和Brian FitzAlan至少有2个女儿。她去世于1340年4月10日在英国越可爾哈布萊頓享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Balliol was born in 1260, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, her father, John de Balliol, was 11257 and her mother, Devorguilla of Galloway, was 50. She had at least 2 daughters with Brian FitzAlan. She died on 10 April 1340, in Hambleton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Balliol est née en 1260, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, John de Balliol, avait 11257 ans et sa mère, Devorguilla of Galloway, avait 50 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Brian FitzAlan. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1340, à Hambleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Balliol 1260 in Barnard Castle, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Balliol 11257 und ihre Mutter Devorguilla of Galloway 50. Sie hatte mit Brian FitzAlan mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. April 1340 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Hambleton, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Balliol è nata il nel 1260 nel Barnard Castle, Durham, England, sua padre, John de Balliol, aveva 11257 anni e sua madre, Devorguilla of Galloway, aveva 50 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Brian FitzAlan. Morì il 10 aprile 1340, nel Hambleton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.Barnard Castle, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムバーナルド カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Balliolが1260年にイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルで生まれた時，父John de Balliolは11257歳，母Devorguilla of Gallowayは50歳であった。彼女はBrian FitzAlanとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1340年4月10日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハンブレトンで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Balliol(이)가 1260년 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Balliol(은)는 11257세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Devorguilla of Galloway(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 Brian FitzAlan(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 4월 10일 영국 요르크실르 햄블레턴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Balliol nasceu em 1260, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Balliol, tinha 11257 anos e sua mãe, Devorguilla of Galloway, tinha 50 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Brian FitzAlan. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1340, em Hambleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Balliol родилась в 1260 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Balliol было 11257 лет, а матери, которую звали Devorguilla of Galloway, 50. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Brian FitzAlan. Она умерла 10 апреля 1340 г. в местности хамблетон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Balliol nació en 1260, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Balliol, tenía 11257 años y su mamá, Devorguilla of Galloway, tenía 50 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Brian FitzAlan. Murió el 10 de abril de 1340, en Hambleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años.
